jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Simplilearn - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
